label: 第147話
source_locator: 単行本17巻 目次 p.87
summary_short: 楽巌寺は上層部の命令で夜蛾を追い、独立して呪力を生み続ける呪骸の製法を聞き出そうとする。夜蛾は致命傷を負い、パンダを生み出した方法を呪いとして楽巌寺へ残す。
summary_full: 渋谷事変後、上層部から死刑を命じられた夜蛾正道は、パンダを助けた日下部に礼を告げて逃走する。追手となった楽巌寺は、夜蛾が自立して呪力を生み続ける呪骸を量産できる危険人物だとして、その製法を問いただす。夜蛾は戦闘で致命傷を負った後、三つの相性の良い魂の情報を核へ入れ、互いを観測させる製法を初めて明かす。情報を力ではなく「呪い」として楽巌寺に残し、到着したパンダの前で死亡する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: The details of creating independent cursed corpses is a process 夜蛾正道 has always kept secret. Since パンダ 's birth, the jujutsu higher-ups have wanted to know and are now using the consequences of the 渋谷事変 as an excuse to apply pressure. With few options left, 正道 says his goodbyes and makes one last attempt to see his son.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 正道 was once interrogated over パンダ's creation. At some point in the past shortly after パンダ's birth, 夜蛾正道 was confined to a cell with both hands wrapped in talismans . He was interrogated by 楽巌寺 on behalf of the higher-ups. It's normal for a 呪骸 to operate independently but they usually consume 呪力 provided by its user as fuel. In comparison, パンダ is a self-supporting 呪骸 that can generate his own 呪力. The higher-ups fear that 正道 could create an army and were at one time in the process of designating him as special grade with an indefinite restraint. After stating this to 正道, 楽巌寺 asked how パンダ was made, but 正道 insisted that he didn't know. 正道 is currently on the run and residing in a forest next to one of his dolls. The 呪骸 is able to talk and calls out to 正道, saying everyone is worried about how gloomy he's become. The doll told the others that they should cheer 正道 up. Then he asks 正道 "aren't I a genius" for confirmation it was a good idea. 正道 pets him and reveals he won't be able to return anytime soon. He adds that 天元様 protects the forest their hiding in and his mother will come to see him again. " 正道... We'll miss you." 正道 opens a small door at the base of a tree where many of his small, harmless, independent cursed corpses reside. They'll be fine without him but they make sure to tell 正道 that they'll miss him. Meanwhile, inside the isolation holding chamber at 呪術高専 , パンダ has been captured and used as a lure to draw out 正道. 日下部 uses his katana to cut パンダ free. He's doing this as a favor to repay 正道 but makes sure to tell パンダ not to reveal who helped him. 正道 secretly created an independent 呪骸 in the past to help support 日下部's sister's mental health. In the past, 正道 created an independent 呪骸 with 日下部's nephew's soul information. His sister couldn't live on without her son's support and remained completely idle in a wheelchair. When brought together to meet, 正道's doll asked if that woman was his mother and then asked "aren't I a genius" because he was right. 日下部's sister recognized her son's mannerisms and that catchphrase, so she instantly ran over out of her wheelchair to embrace him. She called the 呪骸 Takeru repeatedly while squeezing him in her arms. 正道 couldn't allow Takeru to live with his mother because パンダ wasn't around yet and it couldn't get out that a fully independent 呪骸 existed. 日下部 apologized and emotionally expresses his gratitude to 正道 for doing this for his family. Back in the present, 正道 is confronted by a masked sorcerer with a scar across his left eye, an underling of the higher-ups. He asks where 正道 is going without any cursed corpses to back him up. While removing his jacket, the 東京 Principal simply replies that he's going to see his son. The masked sorcerer doesn't quite know what 正道 means but reviews the severity of the situation nonetheless. 正道 has received the death sentence and the only way to save himself is to reveal how to create independent cursed corpses immediately. 正道 says his adversaries have gotten comfortable getting pushy without 悟 around. The masked man agrees, especially because he's been accompanied by a veteran sorcerer. On his way to reunite with パンダ, 夜蛾 is confronted by a sorcerer from 呪術高専. On queue, 楽巌寺 steps out of the shadows armed with his guitar and deals 正道 a fatal blow after a brief scuffle. 正道 is mortally wounded with two deep cuts across his chest forming an x-shape that splatters blood along the wall his dying body is collapsed against. 楽巌寺 tells the sorcerer accompanying him to leave the two principals alone and he obliges. With his last words, 正道 suddenly begins explaining exactly how to create independent cursed corpses. Soul information can be replicated from physical information and inputted into 呪骸 cores. These cores must contain three highly compatible souls and have them constantly observing each other. This is the only way the souls will stabilize and give rise to self-awareness and self-sustaining 呪力. While 正道 explains all of this, パンダ rushes toward where 正道 is in an attempt to find and rescue his father. " It's a curse Principal 楽巌寺. A curse from me.. to you. " Confused and shocked, 楽巌寺 asks why 正道 would tell him now and try to live by revealing this earlier. Before passing on to the afterlife, 正道 replies because it's a curse being passed on from him to 楽巌寺. パンダ arrives too late just as 正道 dies, calling out his name in concern. 楽巌寺 throws down the broken remains of his weapon in anticipation for パンダ to retaliate. However, パンダ simply walks by him towards 正道 without so much as looking 楽巌寺's way. パンダ arrives moments too late to save his father. 楽巌寺 asks why パンダ doesn't fight out of revenge but パンダ reveals that he's not like humans and their behaviors don't bind him. He understands that 楽巌寺 was on good terms with 正道 and these orders came from above. Even so, パンダ sheds tears for his father and tells 楽巌寺 to remember that even Pandas cry. The streetlamp that illuminates the area has moths flying around it. One of them dies from the heat, representing how one drawn to the light by pure ambitions can burn out after getting too close to the sun.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 夜蛾正道 パンダ 楽巌寺嘉伸 Takeru & other cursed corpses 天元 (言及のみ) 日下部篤也 日下部篤也's Sister (回想) 名称不明 禪院 Sorcerer 五条悟 (言及のみ)
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 不明な森林 protected by 天元様 東京 呪術高専 隔離部屋 隔離部屋

key_events_verified_phase8: 日下部がパンダを解放していたことが示される
楽巌寺が夜蛾を追跡して戦う
夜蛾が完全自立型呪骸の製法を明かす
パンダが夜蛾の最期に立ち会う
verification_notes_phase8: 集英社公式16～18巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第八段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
